title: Lab: Repair a Relief-Coordinator Contact Form
summary: Lab: Repair a Relief-Coordinator Contact Form retrieves prior skills in an original unfamiliar focus reflow and error-recovery incident scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply css form inheritance, css form layout, css form focus, css form errors, css form native custom, css form autofill motion in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real unfamiliar focus reflow and error-recovery incident artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.

options.text: Unfamiliar focus reflow and error-recovery incident case 1: apply appearance none to every input select and button before deciding how each control works.
Unfamiliar focus reflow and error-recovery incident case 1: inspect native computed styles, normalize only shared design-system properties, and retest every control type and state across browsers.
Unfamiliar focus reflow and error-recovery incident case 1: copy the body font size onto each option because select descendants render identically everywhere.
